name: AANIKOOBIJIGAN [ancestor/great-grandparent/great-grandchild]
description: ★ Rating: 7/10 🎭 Artistic Merit Aanikoobijan deploys stark cuts between archival footage of Anishinaabe ceremonies and handheld shots of elders reciting family genealogies in dim longhouses; the Khalil brothers' editing pulses like a drumbeat, syncing English…
